scripts.compose:apps:up: BROKER_API_INSTANCES=${BROKER_API_INSTANCES:-2} MATCHING_ENGINE_INSTANCES=${MATCHING_ENGINE_INSTANCES:-2} KAFKA_COMMANDS_PARTITIONS=${KAFKA_COMMANDS_PARTITIONS:-2} docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.yml up --build -d --scale broker-api=$BROKER_API_INSTANCES --scale matching-engine=$MATCHING_ENGINE_INSTANCES broker-api-proxy broker-api matching-engine
scripts.compose:infra:up: docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres kafka
scripts.compose:migrate: docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.yml --profile tools run --rm migrate
